function.message: I can’t provide an exact DoB in DD-MM-YYYY because the canonical record for the experiment box (Foundry) does not contain a DoB/birthday field.
function.rulebook_notes: Root AGENTS says cast files are authoritative for birthdays when present and to ask for clarification if the canonical file does not show the needed fact.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/foundry.md (the experiment box entity) includes `created_on` and `commissioned_on` but no birthday/DoB field. Per AGENTS rules, missing canonical fact must not be guessed.
